description: `export_latest_snapshot` fails when called with a relative output_dir because it computes `relative_to(REPO_ROOT)` against a relative path.
action_taken: Reran export with an absolute output path; SQL was read-only and export succeeded.
next_step: Consider hardening utility later to resolve output_dir before writing metadata.

description: Dashboard must not assume SQL freshness beyond the verified bootstrap snapshot.

description: SQL connection uses local `.env` values; secrets were not printed, but dashboard should not depend on exposing config.
